full_text:
Wei Jie (Qiqing)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wei Jie, styledQiqing, was born in Youfufeng. Admired by the reformist students. Raised troops during the Liang rebellion, died in Xian’s escape. Wei Jie was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Wei Jie lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
